problem id: 28e3bbd3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(3) AND SHR(2)) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  11001010 -> 00010110
  11111111 -> 00111111
  11001100 -> 00100110
  01010100 -> 00000010
  10111110 -> 00100101
  00101110 -> 00000001
  10001101 -> 00100100
  11011011 -> 00010110

query: 10110010
predicted answer: 00000101
